27 May 2026

Nollywood Deserves a Cinema in Every Pocket

Nollywood is the second-largest film industry on earth. And yet, the average Nigerian filmmaker has no idea how many people watched their film last night. That contradiction is why I built Mosion.

Read More
Mosion is building the infrastructure for African cinema distribution, starting in your pocket.
